overall.description: A cinematic aerial sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a massive yellow industrial tower marked '04' with scrolling red neon signage. The camera executes a slow leftward pan around the structure during blue hour, revealing the sprawling neon-lit cityscape, elevated highways, and distant mountains. Flying vehicles occasionally traverse the frame as the perspective shifts from the industrial tower to the open urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of industrial sector and highway interchange

events.description: Flying vehicle with illuminated green accents passes by the tower from right to left

agents.ego_description: Slowly orbiting the industrial tower while maintaining aerial perspective of the surrounding city and highway below

notable_agents.action: Flying car passes by the industrial tower, heading leftward through the frame

entered.detail: Tall yellow industrial building with large white 04 signage and scrolling red neon text reading NO ENTRY
Multi-lane highway with streams of vehicle headlights visible in the distance below
Dark mountain range silhouetted against the blue hour sky on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a massive yellow industrial tower marked '04' with scrolling red neon signs. The camera slowly pans left around the structure, revealing the sprawling cyberpunk city and highway interchange below. At approximately 11 seconds, a flying vehicle passes by the tower from right to left, adding dynamic movement to the dusk atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: Continuing the leftward pan, revealing the elevated highway structure with red support beams on the left side of the frame

entered.detail: Elevated concrete highway structure with distinctive red structural support beams and moving traffic

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues panning left, the industrial tower shifts to the right side of the frame while an elevated highway ramp becomes prominent on the left. The view opens up to show the deep urban canyon between high-rise buildings, with vehicle lights streaming along the highways below and the blue hour sky visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown canyon with neon signage

events.description: Industrial tower 04 exits the frame on the right, transitioning focus entirely to the open city canyon

agents.ego_description: Panning past the industrial tower to focus on the urban canyon and distant skyscrapers

entered.detail: Tall illuminated blue advertising screen mounted on the side of a building facade
Cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows fading into the blue hour distance

segments.scene_description: The industrial tower gradually exits the frame on the right, shifting the focus entirely to the dense urban canyon. The elevated highway remains prominent on the left, while distant skyscrapers and vertical neon billboards fill the center view. The camera maintains its slow leftward drift, showcasing the layered cyberpunk city architecture as night settles over the metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous leftward pan that shifts from a close-up of a massive industrial structure to a wide, sweeping vista of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins with an aerial view of a yellow industrial tower marked '04' with scrolling red neon signs, as a flying vehicle glides past the structure against the dusk atmosphere. As the camera continues its movement, the tower drifts toward the right edge of the frame, allowing an elevated highway ramp and the deep architectural gaps between high-rise buildings to emerge on the left. The scene then expands further as the tower completely exits the frame, opening the view to a dense metropolis of vertical billboards and streaming vehicle lights. Finally, the camera maintains its slow drift across the layered city architecture as the blue hour sky deepens into night.
